scripts.infra:output: terraform -chdir=packages/infrastructure output -json | jq '{alexandriaUserPoolId: .cognito_user_pool_id.value, alexandriaClientId: .cognito_user_pool_client_id.value, apiEndpoint: .api_endpoint.value}' | tee ./packages/web-client-v2/output.json ./packages/cli/bin/config.json > /dev/null
scripts.backend:build: make -C packages/functions build && docker buildx build --platform linux/arm64 -t alexandria/images-processing -f ./packages/functions/images-processing/Dockerfile ./packages/functions/images-processing --provenance false && docker tag alexandria/images-processing 671123374425.dkr.ecr.eu-central-1.amazonaws.com/alexandria/images-processing && docker image prune --force
scripts.backend:deploy: make -C packages/functions package && aws ecr get-login-password --region eu-central-1 | docker login --username AWS --password-stdin 671123374425.dkr.ecr.eu-central-1.amazonaws.com && docker push 671123374425.dkr.ecr.eu-central-1.amazonaws.com/alexandria/images-processing && yarn infra:apply
scripts.frontend:sync: aws s3 sync packages/web-client-v2/dist s3://$(terraform -chdir=packages/infrastructure output -raw webclient_bucket) --delete
scripts.frontend:deploy: yarn frontend:build && yarn frontend:sync && yarn frontend:invalidate
